title: Mermaid diagram embed component with theme support and error handling
purpose: Renders Mermaid diagrams inline with responsive sizing, theme support, and error handling for invalid syntax.
module_context: Exports a DiagramEmbed React component that handles Mermaid diagram rendering with loading states, error display, and node click handlers. Uses useTheme hook for dark/light mode support and initializeMermaid for configuration.

steps.content: Accept diagram content and optional callbacks for render and error handling.
Initialize state for loading and error tracking.
Set up a callback ref to detect when the container is mounted.
Initialize Mermaid with the current theme.
Define a render function that clears previous content and renders the diagram.
Add click event listeners to diagram nodes if a node click handler is provided.
Re-render the diagram when content, theme, or ref changes and Mermaid is ready.
Render loading indicator, error message, or diagram based on current state.
Store the container reference when the ref is set.
Mark the ref as ready when the container is mounted.
Check if the container and content are available for rendering.
Clear any previous diagram content from the container.
Render the Mermaid diagram with a unique identifier.
IF a node click handler is provided, add click listeners to diagram nodes.
Update the loading state to false after successful rendering.
IF rendering fails, capture the error and update the error state.
